title: Come, Ye Disconsolate. (Air.--German.)
content:
Come, ye disconsolate, where'er you languish,
        Come, at God's altar fervently kneel;
    Here bring your wounded hearts, here tell your anguish--
        Earth has no sorrow that Heaven cannot heal.

    Joy of the desolate, Light of the straying,
        Hope, when all others die, fadeless and pure,
    Here speaks the Comforter, in GOD'S name saying--
        "Earth has no sorrow that Heaven cannot cure."

    Go, ask the infidel, what boon he brings us
        What charm for aching hearts he can reveal,
    Sweet as that heavenly promise Hope sings us--
        "Earth has no sorrow that GOD cannot heal."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas Moore delivers a powerful performance in "Come, Ye Disconsolate. (Air.--German.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
